hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞；【WORLD】鲍文：霍尔木兹海峡对峙增加了重新陷入全面战争的风险；【CRYPTO】Ledger 通过 Yield.xyz 将 Hyperliquid Perps 交易集成到其硬件钱包中。

items.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
items.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.
items.title_zh: Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪 (Dario Amodei) 警告称，人工智能为软件公司、政府和银行修复数以万计的漏洞创造了一个狭窄的窗口。

items.title: Bowen: Strait of Hormuz standoff raises risk of sliding back into all-out war
items.summary: The US and Iran's determination to keep the pressure on each other has put the fragile Gulf ceasefire in serious jeopardy.
items.title_zh: 鲍文：霍尔木兹海峡对峙增加了重新陷入全面战争的风险
items.summary_zh: 美国和伊朗决心继续向对方施加压力，这使脆弱的海湾停火协议面临严重危险。

items.title: Ledger integrates Hyperliquid perps trading in its hardware wallets via Yield.xyz
items.summary: About 20% of Ledger users will be able to access Hyperliquid's onchain perps markets from their hardware wallets.
items.title_zh: Ledger 通过 Yield.xyz 将 Hyperliquid Perps 交易集成到其硬件钱包中
items.summary_zh: 大约 20% 的 Ledger 用户将能够从他们的硬件钱包访问 Hyperliquid 的链上 Perps 市场。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant：更智能、更清晰、更个性化
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.5 即时更新 ChatGPT 的默认模型，提供更智能、更准确的答案、减少幻觉并改进个性化控制。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Again Shifts U.S. Focus on Strait, Pausing Day-Old Escort Mission
items.summary: The president made the announcement in a social media post just hours after Secretary of State Marco Rubio had affirmed the newly created mission, which bore little connection to the original justification for war.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普再次将美国重点转向海峡，暂停了一天前的护航任务
items.summary_zh: 就在国务卿马可·鲁比奥确认新成立的代表团几个小时后，总统在社交媒体上宣布了这一消息，该代表团与最初的战争理由几乎没有关系。

items.title: Bitcoin tops $81,000 as Strategy mulls selling its BTC to fund dividend obligations
items.summary: Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor signalling a potential bitcoin sale to cover $1.5 billion in annual dividend obligations sent MSTR down 4% after hours and BTC briefly below $81,000.
items.title_zh: Strategy 考虑出售其 BTC 以支付股息义务，比特币突破 81,000 美元
items.summary_zh: Strategy 执行主席 Michael Saylor 表示，可能会出售比特币来支付 15 亿美元的年度股息义务，导致 MSTR 盘后下跌 4%，比特币一度跌破 81,000 美元。

items.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy signals potential bitcoin sale to fund dividends obligations
items.summary: Michael Saylor proposes using bitcoin sales to support dividends, as Strategy reported a $12.54 billion Q1 loss.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒的策略表明可能出售比特币以资助股息义务
items.summary_zh: Michael Saylor 建议使用比特币销售来支持股息，因为 Strategy 报告第一季度亏损 125.4 亿美元。

items.title: Kraken eyes IPO as it partners with MoneyGram to bridge crypto-to-cash gap
items.summary: Payward and Kraken co-CEO Arjun Sethi says the exchange is “80% ready” to go public, as a new partnership with MoneyGram aims to expand access to digital assets by solving last-mile cash conversion.
items.title_zh: Kraken 考虑首次公开募股，与 MoneyGram 合作以弥合加密货币与现金之间的差距
items.summary_zh: Payward 和 Kraken 联合首席执行官 Arjun Sethi 表示，该交易所已“80% 准备好”上市，因为与 MoneyGram 的新合作伙伴关系旨在通过解决最后一英里现金转换来扩大数字资产的使用范围。

items.title: Strategy likely to sell bitcoin to cover STRC dividends, Michael Saylor says
items.summary: Saylor explained that this will eventually help Strategy buy more bitcoin than it sells to cover dividends for its STRC.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒表示，可能会出售比特币来支付 STRC 股息的策略
items.summary_zh: Saylor 解释说，这最终将帮助 Strategy 购买比出售的更多的比特币，以支付其 STRC 的股息。

items.title: Strategy posts $12.5 billion Q1 loss as execs tout STRC ‘big success’
items.summary: The premier bitcoin treasury company said strong demand for STRC helped it raise $5.58 billion out of a total $11.68 billion so far this year.
items.title_zh: Strategy 公布第一季度亏损 125 亿美元，高管称 STRC“取得巨大成功”
items.summary_zh: 这家首屈一指的比特币资金公司表示，对 STRC 的强劲需求帮助其筹集了 55.8 亿美元，而今年迄今为止，该公司筹集的资金总额为 116.8 亿美元。

items.title: SoFi to launch its stablecoin on Solana, citing speed and cost
items.summary: SoFiUSD is a fully reserved U.S. dollar stablecoin issued by SoFi Bank, a nationally chartered bank.
items.title_zh: SoFi 将在 Solana 上推出稳定币，理由是速度和成本
items.summary_zh: SoFiUSD是由国家特许银行SoFi Bank发行的全额储备的美元稳定币。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports
items.summary: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推进特朗普支持的终止强制性季度收益报告的提案
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 正式提议修改规则，允许公司以新表格 10-S 提交半年报，以取代传统的季度 10-Q 表格

items.title: UniCredit CEO says taking control of Commerzbank ‘not the expected scenario’
items.summary: The Italian lender is making a takeover bid for German rival Commerzbank, despite pushback in Germany.
items.title_zh: 联合信贷银行首席执行官表示，控制德国商业银行“不是预期的情况”
items.summary_zh: 尽管遭到德国的反对，这家意大利银行仍在向德国竞争对手德国商业银行提出收购要约。

items.title: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz won’t return to normal until August or later, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: With a lack of a breakthrough in negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, traders increasingly see traffic returning to normal later and later.
items.title_zh: 卡尔什贸易商表示，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到八月或更晚才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 由于美国和伊朗之间的谈判缺乏突破，交易员越来越认为交通恢复正常的时间越来越晚。

items.title: 'Nothing will bring back my son': How 10 minutes of bombing by Israel shattered lives in Lebanon
items.summary: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.
items.title_zh: “没有什么能带回我的儿子”：以色列十分钟的轰炸如何摧毁了黎巴嫩的生活
items.summary_zh: 炸弹于下午 14 点 15 分开始落下，给全国带来混乱和破坏。

items.title: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
items.summary: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.
items.title_zh: 在基辅和莫斯科提出停火协议之前，俄罗斯的袭击造成20多人死亡
items.summary_zh: 基辅表示将于5月6日开始休战，然后在莫斯科宣布暂停胜利日阅兵后“采取对称行动”。

items.title: Trump Looks for a Silver Bullet to End the Iran War. There May Be None.
items.summary: The president is trying to ratchet up the economic pressure on Tehran, but Iran’s government is unlikely to make a deal without a big, face-saving compromise.
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求结束伊朗战争的灵丹妙药。可能没有。
items.summary_zh: 总统正试图加大对德黑兰的经济压力，但如果不做出重大的、保全面子的妥协，伊朗政府不太可能达成协议。

items.title: North Korea terror victims escalate fight to seize $71 million from Aave hack
items.summary: In a 30-page response filed Tuesday, attorneys for victims of three North Korea terrorism cases reframed the April 18 Aave hack as fraud rather than theft — a distinction that could give the attackers legal title to the borrowed crypto.
items.title_zh: 朝鲜恐怖受害者升级打击行动，从 Aave 黑客攻击中夺取 7100 万美元
items.summary_zh: 在周二提交的一份长达 30 页的回复中，三起朝鲜恐怖主义案件受害者的律师将 4 月 18 日 Aave 黑客攻击重新定义为欺诈而不是盗窃——这一区别可能会让攻击者获得对借来的加密货币的合法所有权。

items.title: AI agents are breaking web economics, but Cloudflare says x402 can help
items.summary: The company’s Chief Strategy Officer said that more than half of internet traffic is now non-human, but that the x402 Foundation is building the rails for a "golden age of content."
items.title_zh: AI 代理正在打破网络经济，但 Cloudflare 表示 x402 可以提供帮助
items.summary_zh: 该公司首席战略官表示，现在超过一半的互联网流量是非人类的，但 x402 基金会正在为“内容的黄金时代”构建轨道。

items.title: CFTC looks to cement non-custodial software developer protections following Phantom no-action letter
items.summary: The CFTC is considering writing rules to further cement its stance on whether software developers should register as brokers with the agency.
items.title_zh: CFTC 希望在 Phantom 无行动信函之后加强对非托管软件开发商的保护
items.summary_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会正在考虑制定规则，以进一步巩固其关于软件开发商是否应在该机构注册为经纪人的立场。

items.title: CME Group to launch cash-settled bitcoin volatility futures
items.summary: Traders use volatility products to speculate on or hedge against swings without having to take a directional bet on prices.
items.title_zh: 芝商所推出现金结算的比特币波动率期货
items.summary_zh: 交易者使用波动率产品来投机或对冲波动，而无需对价格进行定向押注。

items.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
items.summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
items.title_zh: 购买 ChatGPT 广告的新方式
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过测试版自助广告管理器、每次点击费用出价和增强的测量工具扩展了 ChatGPT 广告，旨在保护隐私并将对话与广告分开。

items.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
items.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道合作重新构想 CFO 办公室
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道正在合作，帮助企业使用人工智能代理实现财务工作流程自动化、改进预测、加强控制以及实现 CFO 职能现代化。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: The world's entire economy will be tokenized, says Consensys’ Joseph Lubin
items.summary: The Consensys CEO and founder said tokenization can be traced back to Ethereum, the blockchain he helped co-found.
items.title_zh: Consensys 的 Joseph Lubin 表示，世界整个经济都将被代币化
items.summary_zh: 这位 Consensys 首席执行官兼创始人表示，代币化可以追溯到他帮助共同创立的区块链以太坊。

items.title: State Street and Galaxy launch fund on Solana designed to ‘sweep’ stablecoins into productive vehicle
items.summary: The State Street Galaxy Onchain Liquidity Sweep Fund lets investors push stablecoins into a yield-bearing tokenized fund.
items.title_zh: 道富银行和 Galaxy 在 Solana 上推出基金，旨在将稳定币“扫荡”到生产工具中
items.summary_zh: 道富银河链上流动性周转基金允许投资者将稳定币投入有收益的代币化基金。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones
items.summary: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.
items.title_zh: 英特尔和美光准备打破重大里程碑
items.summary_zh: 期权交易者无法获得足够的半导体股票。

items.title: After Coinbase, prediction market traders forecast more tech layoffs ahead
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platforms give a high probability to layoffs in the tech sector reaching more than 447,000 jobs in 2026.
items.title_zh: 继Coinbase之后，预测市场交易员预测未来还会有更多科技公司裁员
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员预计，2026 年科技行业裁员人数将超过 44.7 万个。

items.title: Milken-adjacent Power100 attendees aim to reclaim the DEI in finance narrative
items.summary: Blueprint Capital's Power100 weekend convenes diverse leaders in finance ahead of the Milken Institute Global Conference.
items.title_zh: 米尔肯相邻的 Power100 与会者旨在重新夺回金融叙事中的 DEI
items.summary_zh: Blueprint Capital 的 Power100 周末在米尔肯研究所全球会议之前聚集了金融界的不同领导人。

items.title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
items.summary: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.
items.title_zh: 由于预期信贷损失增加，第一季度税前利润未达预期，汇丰股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 欧洲最大的银行汇丰银行周二公布第一季度税前利润为 94 亿美元，略低于分析师的预期。

items.title: Traders are doubtful Cohen's GameStop can pull off monster eBay acquisition
items.summary: Traders on Kalshi and Polymarket give the company just a 25% and 15% chance, respectively, of successfully buying the online marketplace.
items.title_zh: 交易员怀疑科恩的 GameStop 能否完成 eBay 的巨额收购
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 上的交易者认为该公司成功购买在线市场的机会分别只有 25% 和 15%。

items.title: Kalshi traders see April jobs report coming in better than economists' estimates
items.summary: The figure is higher than consensus estimates for 57,000 jobs gained in April, according to analysts polled by FactSet.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为四月份就业报告好于经济学家的预期
items.summary_zh: FactSet 调查的分析师称，这一数字高于 4 月份新增 57,000 个就业岗位的普遍预期。

items.title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
items.summary: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.
items.title_zh: 要么留下来，要么冒险走上“死亡之路”——被困在前线城市的乌克兰平民
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰奥列什基市的人们表示，他们的新鲜食品或药品供应已经中断了几个月。

items.title: Cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak to sail to Canary Islands
items.summary: Spain's health ministry said the MV Hondius is expected to arrive within three to four days.
items.title_zh: 爆发汉坦病毒的游轮将驶往加那利群岛
items.summary_zh: 西班牙卫生部表示，MV Hondius 预计将在三到四天内抵达。

items.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins Republican nomination for Ohio governor
items.summary: He spent much of the race criticising the state's response to the Covid-19 pandemic led by the Democrat nominee.
items.title_zh: 维韦克·拉马斯瓦米赢得俄亥俄州州长共和党提名
items.summary_zh: 他在竞选的大部分时间里批评该州对民主党候选人领导的Covid-19大流行的反应。

items.title: Dressed for succession: What Kim Ju Ae's outfits tell us about North Korea
items.summary: Kim Ju Ae's evolving fashion is one of the signs that she is being groomed as North Korea's next leader.
items.title_zh: 为继任而着装：金珠爱的着装告诉我们关于朝鲜的事
items.summary_zh: 金珠爱不断变化的时尚是她正在被培养为朝鲜下一任领导人的标志之一。

items.title: 'I had to stick to the plan': Officer describes retrieving crocodile with human remains inside
items.summary: DNA tests are underway to confirm whether remains found inside the crocodile match that of a missing man.
items.title_zh: “我必须坚持计划”：官员描述打捞鳄鱼遗骸时的情景
items.summary_zh: DNA测试正在进行中，以确认鳄鱼体内发现的遗骸是否与失踪男子的遗骸相符。

items.title: What is Trump's 'Project Freedom' in the Strait of Hormuz?
items.summary: The US president said the operation has been paused after starting on Monday.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在霍尔木兹海峡的“自由计划”是什么？
items.summary_zh: 美国总统表示，行动自周一开始后已暂停。

items.title: IS families in Syria have booked tickets home to Australia, minister says
items.summary: The four women and nine children with links to Islamic State have spent years in a Syrian camp.
items.title_zh: 部长表示，叙利亚的伊斯兰国家庭已预订返回澳大利亚的机票
items.summary_zh: 与伊斯兰国有联系的四名妇女和九名儿童已在叙利亚营地度过了数年。

items.title: In Venezuela, Trump Vowed to Show Accountability. But Secret Oil Deals Linger.
items.summary: Trump officials and their Venezuelan allies have promised a new era of accountability to unlock Venezuela’s immense oil wealth. But the country’s oil industry remains a black hole.
items.title_zh: 在委内瑞拉，特朗普誓言要承担责任。但秘密石油交易依然存在。
items.summary_zh: 特朗普官员及其委内瑞拉盟友承诺开启问责新时代，以释放委内瑞拉巨大的石油财富。但该国的石油工业仍然是一个黑洞。

items.title: Rare Comet Appears Over New Zealand, Australia and South Africa
items.summary: Known as C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS, the comet will be visible to stargazers using a telescope in New Zealand, Australia and South Africa.
items.title_zh: 罕见彗星出现在新西兰、澳大利亚和南非上空
items.summary_zh: 这颗被称为 C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS 的彗星将被新西兰、澳大利亚和南非的观星者使用望远镜观测到。

items.title: Modi’s Triumph in West Bengal Elections Puts Him Closer to an Opposition-Free India
items.summary: With his triumph in West Bengal state elections, Prime Minister Narendra Modi has moved closer to his dream of an opposition-free India.
items.title_zh: 莫迪在西孟加拉邦选举中的胜利使他更接近无反对派的印度
items.summary_zh: 随着西孟加拉邦选举的胜利，总理纳伦德拉·莫迪离他建立一个没有反对派的印度的梦想又近了一步。

items.title: What a Bike Ride in Cape Town Taught Me About Apartheid
items.summary: A New York Times reporter joined a group of cyclists on a route meant to break down Cape Town’s lingering racial and economic barriers.
items.title_zh: 在开普敦骑自行车让我了解了种族隔离
items.summary_zh: 《纽约时报》的一名记者加入了一群骑自行车的人，踏上了一条旨在打破开普敦挥之不去的种族和经济障碍的路线。

items.title: Taiwan Could Learn From Ukraine. Informally, Connections Are Growing.
items.summary: The governments have no official diplomatic or military ties. But a loose network led by company executives and volunteers is bridging some of that gulf.
items.title_zh: 台湾可以向乌克兰学习。非正式地，联系正在增长。
items.summary_zh: 两国政府没有正式的外交或军事关系。但由公司高管和志愿者领导的松散网络正在弥合部分鸿沟。

items.title: The Growing Rift Between the UAE and Saudi Arabia, Explained
items.summary: Officials say competition between the countries is healthy. But tensions are mounting over energy quotas, regional conflicts and their different visions for the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋和沙特阿拉伯之间日益扩大的裂痕解释
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，两国之间的竞争是健康的。但由于能源配额、地区冲突以及两国对中东的不同愿景，紧张局势正在加剧。

items.title: Cruise Ship Struck by Hantavirus Is to Head to Canary Islands, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: The Spanish government will receive the vessel. The World Health Organization said human-to-human transmission may have played a role in the outbreak.

items.summary_zh: 西班牙政府将接收这艘船。世界卫生组织表示，人际传播可能在此次疫情爆发中发挥了作用。

items.title: Fireworks Factory Explosion in China Kills at Least 26
items.summary: Dozens more were injured in the explosion, which appeared to be one of the country’s deadliest in recent years.
items.title_zh: 中国烟花厂爆炸造成至少26人死亡
items.summary_zh: 另有数十人在爆炸中受伤，这似乎是该国近年来最致命的爆炸之一。

items.title: XRP above $1.42 as traders watch 2025 breakout pattern that led to 66% rally
items.summary: Price compression near $1.42 comes as analysts point to a repeating bull flag structure and thinning liquidity conditions.
items.title_zh: XRP 突破 1.42 美元，交易员关注 2025 年突破模式，导致 66% 的上涨
items.summary_zh: 由于分析师指出反复的牛旗结构和流动性状况减弱，价格压缩至 1.42 美元附近。

items.title: Trust in crypto remains biggest barrier to adoption, say Consensus Miami 2026 panelists
items.summary: Speakers point to complexity, poor user experience and lack of transparency as key obstacles for mainstream users.
items.title_zh: 迈阿密共识 2026 小组成员表示，对加密货币的信任仍然是采用加密货币的最大障碍
items.summary_zh: 发言者指出复杂性、糟糕的用户体验和缺乏透明度是主流用户面临的主要障碍。

items.title: It's transparency, not tech alone, that drives crypto adoption, panelists tell Consensus Miami
items.summary: Execs from PayPal, Robinhood, Public.com and 248 Ventures said the way to move retail into crypto and AI is to slow down, show your work, and put users back in control.
items.title_zh: 小组成员告诉迈阿密共识，推动加密货币采用的是透明度，而不仅仅是技术
items.summary_zh: PayPal、Robinhood、Public.com 和 248 Ventures 的高管表示，将零售业转向加密货币和人工智能的方法是放慢速度，展示你的工作，让用户重新掌控一切。

items.title: Different voices in product, policy and hiring change crypto outcomes, panelists tell Consensus Miami
items.summary: Senior leaders from Mastercard, the Crypto Council for Innovation and Clerisy said the right people in the right rooms can reshape internal decisions, citing examples from stablecoin-linked cards and financial access to staking-policy framing in Washington.
items.title_zh: 小组成员告诉迈阿密共识，产品、政策和招聘方面的不同声音改变了加密货币的结果
items.summary_zh: 万事达卡、加密货币创新委员会和 Clerisy 的高级领导人表示，合适的人在合适的房间可以重塑内部决策，并引用了与稳定币挂钩的卡以及华盛顿质押政策框架的财务准入的例子。

items.title: Crypto whale sues Coinbase for allegedly refusing to return stolen DAI
items.summary: The plaintiff fell victim to a phishing scam that drained his DAI holdings, with part of the funds later traced to a Coinbase user account.
items.title_zh: 加密鲸起诉 Coinbase 涉嫌拒绝归还被盗 DAI
items.summary_zh: 原告成为网络钓鱼诈骗的受害者，耗尽了他所持有的 DAI，部分资金后来被追踪到 Coinbase 用户帐户。

items.title: Kelp DAO ditches LayerZero for Chainlink’s cross-chain infrastructure following $292 million exploit
items.summary: Many onlookers blame LayerZero's default infrastructure setup because the cross-chain bridge that was attacked used a 1-of-1 configuration.
items.title_zh: Kelp DAO 在遭受 2.92 亿美元的攻击后放弃了 LayerZero，转而使用 Chainlink 的跨链基础设施
items.summary_zh: 许多旁观者指责 LayerZero 的默认基础设施设置，因为受到攻击的跨链桥使用了 1-of-1 配置。

items.title: ‘We do not see a middle ground’: TD Cowen says stablecoin yield fight could still delay crypto bill
items.summary: The dispute could still delay the crypto bill and reduce the chances of it passing this year, despite a proposed compromise, the firm said.
items.title_zh: “我们看不到中间立场”：TD Cowen 表示稳定币收益率之争仍可能推迟加密法案
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示，尽管提出了妥协方案，但这场争议仍可能推迟加密货币法案的通过，并降低该法案今年通过的可能性。
